# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Please provide a brief description of your changes.

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/Style update
- [ ] 🎲 New generation rule

## 🎲 For New Generation Rules

If you're adding a new generation rule, please complete the following:

- [ ] Rule file follows the naming convention: `{style}-{language}-{variant}.json`
- [ ] Rule ID matches the file name
- [ ] All required fields are present (id, name, style, languages, algorithm, data, author)
- [ ] Rule passes JSON schema validation (`npm run validate-rules`)
- [ ] Author information is complete (name, github)
- [ ] Examples are provided (at least 3)
- [ ] Rule description is clear in all supported languages

**Rule Details:**
- **Style**: (e.g., cyberpunk, cute, professional)
- **Language**: (e.g., zh, en, ja)
- **Algorithm**: (e.g., combination, template, markov, syllable)
- **File Path**: `rules/custom/your-rule-name.json`

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## 🖼️ Screenshots (if applicable)

Please add screenshots to demonstrate UI changes.

## 📋 Additional Notes

Add any other context about the pull request here.

---

Thank you for contributing to Bot Name Generator! 🎉
